description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Flatpak that triggers on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. In an ubuntu-latest job, install flatpak and its dependencies, configure flatpak, and then checkout multiple repositories into a directory structure. Set up a tmate session on failure, move a manifest file, build a flatpak package using flatpak-builder, create a bundle, upload the bundle as an artifact, and perform cleanup.
